calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Probate Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-01-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Continued To Sep-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Clara McDaniel.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she received the Examiner's notes, that the certificate of participation had been called in 1995, that there was no record of the series EE bonds being purchased by the Johnson estate and that there was a superior claim brought by David Redwine III. In addition, she stated that the inventory had not changed, that the estate had zero value and that she intended to close the estate. The matter was continued to September 1, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of the petition to terminate the estate.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tamra Keen, CSR#5404. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Continued To Aug-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Citation will be issued to the Attorney for failure to appear and for failure to file the Inventory and Appraisal. The return date is August 4, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Continued To Jul-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for the Petitioner.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio requested a continuance stating that an additional claim had been asserted in the estate of David Redwine, III in Louisiana. In addition, she stated that if the claim was found to be valid, that it would wipe out Luella's interest. Furthermore, Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that the fair market value of Mr. Redwine's estate was somewhere between $480,000.00 to $540,000.00. The matter was continued to July 7, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Continued To Apr-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Continued To Mar-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Clara McDaniel (Petitioner).

Ms. Fisher-Koudia requested a 60 day continuance stating that she needed time to determine if the Heirs had the missing series EE Bonds and that she had not received the table of distribution from the Louisiana Court matter. The matter was continued to March 18, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Continued To Jan-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Clara McDaniel.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio requested a continuance stating that the Louisiana Administration had identified a number of assets, that they were in the process of preparing the table of distribution and that she would know what her client's estate would be entitled to once that was completed. The matter was continued to January 14, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Oct-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio (Administrator in Pro Per).

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that the Inventory and Appraisal had not been filed, that Ms. Johnson did not own assets outright, that she was a beneficiary of assets in another estate and that those assets needed to be identified. In addition, she stated that the family members had not produced the documents regarding the assets. The matter was continued to October 29, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to July 23, 2008. The Inventory and Appraisal must be filed at least two days prior to the hearing date. An endorsed copy should be delivered to room 202.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M.Loos.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
